description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by mature trees and featuring a flat roof with solar panels. The structure is primarily composed of wood and glass, with large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for ample natural light. The front area includes a driveway with a carport and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. Outdoor amenities include a wooden deck, a swimming pool, and a small shed or outbuilding adjacent to the main house. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a mix of paved, grassy, and planted areas. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass windows, wood paneling, a pool, and lush surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, and a clear view of the pool and deck area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, outdoor seating, and the shed, with trees lining the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, pool, and a glass-walled section of the house, with more trees visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shed, carport, and a secondary entrance, with the deck and pool partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
